description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low brick and concrete perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof design and a spacious, well-manicured lawn. The structure is composed of several rectangular volumes, with a mix of wood-textured and neutral-colored exterior walls. A covered patio area with a pergola and outdoor seating is visible, adjacent to a small pool and landscaped garden with rocks and shrubs. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The front entrance is accessible via a central pathway leading through the yard, flanked by greenery and trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, wood-textured walls, large windows, a covered patio, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low brick wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered patio, pool, and landscaped garden with rocks and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive lawn, back facade, and the bungalow's rectangular volumes.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long stretch of the building, wood-textured walls, and large windows.
description_view_3: Side angle showing the patio, pool area, and the connection between the outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
